name: Mary L. Ruse — children
researcher_question: What were the names of the children of Mary L. Ruse, wife of Albert Raney, of Loudon Township, Seneca County, Ohio?
notes: Mary L. Ruse married Albert Raney (1878, Seneca Co., OH); their children were born in Loudon Township, Seneca County, Ohio. Children (deduped from a messy tree with duplicate entries): Ora S. Raney (1879), Armeda/Armedia Elvina Raney (1881), Bertha Belle Raney (1887), Mary L. Raney (1887), Robert M. Raney (1891). Stripped all child persons + the birth/marriage records that name a child. Anchors left: Mary's own birth/marriage/census/SSN records, the Mary-Albert marriage, and the census households (which enumerate the children when read). Reachability confirmed: Ohio birth records name the mother 'Mary L. Ruse', so a mother-name search returns the children (top hits). NOTE: the submitted vitals (b. 16 Nov 1882, d. 1915) do not match the tree — the person at this PID is b. ~1855 and appears in census/SSN through 1940; built around the person at the PID.
